# Vendored Libraries

## marked v15.0.12
- **Purpose**: GitHub Flavored Markdown parser
- **License**: MIT
- **Source**: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/marked/marked.min.js
- **Homepage**: https://github.com/markedjs/marked

## highlight.js v11.11.1
- **Purpose**: Syntax highlighting for code blocks
- **License**: BSD-3-Clause
- **Source**: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/highlightjs/cdn-release@11.11.1/build/
- **Homepage**: https://highlightjs.org/

### Bundled Languages
- javascript, python, go, bash, sql, json, yaml, xml
